creator: Vallo.Kallaste@myhakas.matti.ee
text:
Kernel compile fails because of missing declarations. Can't compile 
 kernel without DUMMYNET and IPFIREWALL support if BRIDGE included.

Fix: 

In my level of knowledge simply add IPFIREWALL and DUMMYNET, it 
 doesn't hurt. Certainly there are other ways.
How-To-Repeat:  
 Just try to compile kernel with BRIDGE included but IPFIREWALL and 
 DUMMYNET excluded.
